task: Identify the open issue with the most comments in the first trending open-source repository this week.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task. The trajectory shows the weekly GitHub Trending page at https://github.com/trending?since=weekly, where the first listed repository is clearly anthropics/financial-services. The agent then opened that repository’s issues page with the query `is:issue state:open sort:comments-desc`, and the results show issue #108, “claude app can not add this,” at the top with 3 comments, ahead of other open issues with 2 or fewer comments. The issue page for #108 was also opened, confirming it is an open issue. Therefore the identified issue is correct.
final_result_response:
Re-checked the GitHub weekly trending page.

Confirmed first repository listed this week: **anthropics/financial-services** with **13,176 stars this week**.

Then I checked its open issues sorted by comments descending. The top-commented open issue is:

**#108: “claude app can not add this”**  
- **Comments:** 3  
- **Opened by:** naniwet  
- **URL:** https://github.com/anthropics/financial-services/issues/108
action_history: Opening GitHub trending: const p1 = await openTab('https://github.com/trending?since=weekly');
Opening sorted issues: const p2 = await openTab('https://github.com/anthropics/financial-services/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20sort%3Acomments-desc');
Re-checking weekly trending: const p3 = await openTab('https://github.com/trending?since=weekly');
